active_submission_notes: Formal FPGA-closed submission path is RV32I+Zmmul+Zba/Zbb/Zbs+JAL early redirect, M=0, no Zbc/XThead/IDBR in the frozen bitstream: 4.137461 CoreMark/MHz and 2.908287 DMIPS/MHz.
PYNQ-Z2 implementation evidence for the formal path: 4934 LUT, 2327 FF, 4 BRAM, 15 DSP, WNS=+0.440 ns, WHS=+0.151 ns, PROGRAM_OK on xc7z020_1.
Dhrystone/DMIPS final summary is available: 2.908287 DMIPS/MHz, 510986 Dhrystones/s, 10 runs; optimized generated-copy build with no-inline pragma stripped only in generated copies.
High-performance exploratory path reached 5.162186 CoreMark/MHz and 2.986101 DMIPS/MHz, but full PYNQ-Z2 implementation was 6147 LUT and WNS=-0.801 ns, so it is not the frozen submission path.
LaTeX cover logo source is ../../官方模板/logo.png from each document source directory.
After every LaTeX source change, rebuild with XeLaTeX and copy main.pdf over the top-level submission PDF.
After every worktree documentation change, resync the unpacked source folder and rerun the final submission audit; the user will create the source ZIP later.
PPT and video are represented by detailed MD planning documents only; the user will create the actual PPT/video.
Submission source comment-rate was mechanically improved to about 30.27%; scripts/run_zmmul_test.bat passed afterward from the source submission directory.
